prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7672→7475→7406→6977→6942，整体呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约464名，2025年基准约6942名，表明报考热度逐年上升；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为4人，2025年增至6人，2026年计划仍为6人，与2025年持平；但同期福建省物理类考生从2021年约11.7万增至20 25年约19.2万，2026年估算约20.4万，考生规模持续扩大，计划不变意味着竞争实际加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名 近年稳定在第59–66位区间（2026年第65名），属中上水平工科强校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（涉及拟录取研究生不当言论事件），但抖音热度排名 第57（较热），综合关注度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程 获评A-，工科基础扎实；招生专业中的信息安全（实验班）对应计算机/网络安全方向，数学类对应基础理学，机械类对应机械工程，与优势学科关联紧密。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 信息安全/计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续偏热，数学类作为基础学科推荐度上升；机械类社会热度分化观望。福建省物理类。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平但福建省物理类考生明显增加（竞争加剧）、 学校211层次稳定、声誉偏负面但抖音关注度较热等因素，在2025年基准6942名基础上预计竞争继续小幅加剧；预测最低位次约6972名，区间6472–7472名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京工业大学在福建省物理类仅招3个专业（含2026年新增网络空间安全），专业选择较少。位次在预测区间（6472–7472名）内，建议以二档机械类为主力填报，一档信息安全 （实验班）和数学类作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<6472名）可重点冲刺一档专业。由于专业数量极少，建议同时关注其他院校的保底志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7672 → 7475 → 7406 → 6977 → 6942, showing a continuous upward trend overall, with a cumulative advancement of about 464 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 6942, indicating increasing application popularity year by year; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 4 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 6 students in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 6 students, unchanged from 2025; however, during the same period, the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province increased from about 117,000 in 2021 to about 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026, as the examinee pool continues to expand, unchanged enrollment means actual competition intensifies.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 59–66 range in recent years (65th in 2026), placing it as a mid-to-upper level strong engineering university; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving an incident of inappropriate remarks by a proposed graduate student), but its Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with overall attention at mid-to-upper level; no significant enrollment gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-, indicating a solid engineering foundation; the enrolled majors, such as Information Security (Experimental Class) corresponding to computer/network security, Mathematics Category corresponding to basic sciences, and Mechanical Category corresponding to mechanical engineering, are closely related to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Information Security/Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors continues to be relatively hot; Mathematics Category as a basic discipline has rising recommendation; Mechanical Category social popularity is divided and wait-and-see. Fujian Province Physics Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 but with a significant increase in Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province (intensified competition), the stable 211 level of the university, somewhat negative reputation but relatively hot Douyin attention, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 6942; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6972, with a range of 6472–7472.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beijing University of Technology only enrolls 3 majors (including the newly added Cyberspace Security in 2026) for Physics Category in Fujian Province, with few major choices. If your ranking is within the predicted range (6472–7472), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Mechanical Category as the main choice, with Tier 1 Information Security (Experimental Class) and Mathematics Category as reach options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6472), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. Due to the very limited number of majors, it is advisable to also consider backup options at other institutions.
